MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT OF PLAINTIFF A VIS BUDGET GROUPS EX PARTE MOTION FOR TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (TRANSACTION ID # 62809846) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AVIS BUDGET GROUP

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE COURT WILL EXECUTE THE PROPOSED ORDER, BUT WILL REMOVE REFERENCES TO THE DMV AND ITS DIRECTOR (FORMERLY JEAN SHIOMOTO, NOW ACTING DIRECTOR BILL DAVIDSON). THERE IS NO EVIDENCE THAT THOSE PARTIES HAVE BEEN SERVED WITH THIS ACTION OR THIS MOTION. ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO CSR#8600, EMAIL: MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM =(302/EPS)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-10-2019 Off Calendar

Plaintiff'S Motion For Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Jan-30-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff'S Motion For Preliminary Injunction.

Plaintiff's motion for preliminary injunction is granted. No opposition filed. The court will execute the proposed order, but will remove references to the DMV and its director (formerly Jean Shiomoto, now acting director Bill Davidson). There is no evidence that those parties have been served with this action or this motion.

Order is signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: W. Trupek; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com =(302/EPS)
